runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 6th in a Maiden on April 12 over 435m at this track behind Vienna On Show beaten 11 lengths (25.55). Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 6th in a Maiden on April 12 over 435m at this track behind Vienna On Show beaten 11 lengths (25.55). Should be right in the finish.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when third (23.36) over 400m at Warragul. Aided by a low draw and capable of a better result.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when third (23.36) over 400m at Warragul. Aided by a low draw and capable of a better result.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 435m at this track. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 435m at this track. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked and lost ground on first turn.

runners.formComment: Yet to break through in 14 runs, the latest effort a second over 435m at this track in 25.11. Has finished in the money at the last three starts. Should go very well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Yet to break through in 14 runs, the latest effort a second over 435m at this track in 25.11. Has finished in the money at the last three starts. Should go very well.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Maiden on April 9 over 400m at Warragul behind Dodging Shadows beaten 6 lengths (23.47). Recorded two placings in a row prior to the latest effort. Worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th in a Maiden on April 9 over 400m at Warragul behind Dodging Shadows beaten 6 lengths (23.47). Recorded two placings in a row prior to the latest effort. Worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Collided approaching first turn and fell.

runners.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (25.30) over 435m at this track. Drawn out wide and will need the breaks to go her way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (25.30) over 435m at this track. Drawn out wide and will need the breaks to go her way.

runners.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished seventh over 460m at Warragul, beaten 15 lengths. Hard to recommend this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished seventh over 460m at Warragul, beaten 15 lengths. Hard to recommend this time.

runners.formComment: Finished second last start (26.77) over 460m at Warragul. Wide draw here. Top-three aspirations.
